parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Export format: xlsx or csv. Default: xlsx

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Records to export: all, filtered, current_page, or selected. Default: filtered

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Comma-separated column keys to include. Allowed: id, transaction_id, integration_instance, transaction_type, description, transaction_status, posted_date, total_amount, currency_code, amazon_order_id, settlement_id, marketplace_id, shipment_id, breakdown_totals, processed_at, created_at, updated_at

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated transaction IDs (only used when scope=selected)
